1812510.name: The Meat Factory
1812510.description:
Content

  • A grating story about a horrific place set after a devastating event that puts a strain on food and the like.

  • An alternate story ending... If you can find it.

  • Exploration through an aesthetically gritty, rough, and retro style game.

  • Extra story and lore to be discovered through notes, and computers.

  • Interesting puzzles to solve.

Taken from your home in the middle of the night, you are one of the unlucky ones to be picked to aid in the food shortage. You know nothing about The Meat Factory or why you are there, but it can't be good.

You are no fighter; you'll have to use stealth and/or wits to get your way through tough situations.

This game contains dark and occasionally unpleasant story moments.
1812510.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
